audit_status.source_base: Greek Titus text tradition, draft aligned to public-domain comparison layer later
audit_status.review_note: Compact draft reviewed for civic posture, kindness and renewal, heirs, good works, foolish disputes, divisive person, final greetings.

verses.restored: Remind them to be arranged under rulers and authorities, to obey, to be ready for every beautiful/good work,
to blaspheme/slander no one, to be non-quarrelsome, gentle, showing all meekness toward all humans.
For we also were once foolish, disobedient, led astray, enslaved to various desires and pleasures, passing life in harmfulness and envy, hated and hating one another.
But when the kindness and love-for-humanity of our Savior/Healer Divine appeared,
not from works in righteousness/justice that we did, but according to his mercy, he saved/healed us through washing of rebirth and renewal of holy Spirit,
which he poured out upon us richly through Jesus Messiah our Savior/Healer,
so that, having been made righteous/just by his grace, we might become heirs according to hope of age-long life.

Trustworthy is the saying; and concerning these things I desire you to insist, so that those having trusted the Divine may be careful to stand before beautiful/good works. These things are beautiful/good and beneficial to humans.
But avoid foolish inquiries and genealogies and strifes and fights about Law, for they are unbeneficial and empty.
A divisive human, after one and a second admonition, refuse,
knowing that such a one has been turned out of alignment and is sinning/missing the mark, being self-condemned.
When I send Artemas to you or Tychicus, be eager to come to me at Nicopolis, for there I have decided to winter.
Diligently send forward Zenas the lawyer and Apollos, so that nothing may be lacking to them.
And let our people also learn to stand before beautiful/good works for necessary needs, so that they may not be unfruitful.
All those with me greet you. Greet those loving us in trust. Grace be with all of you.

translation_notes: Civic submission language must be bounded by good works, gentleness, and non-slander; it is not absolute obedience to injustice.
Regeneration/renewal is mercy and Spirit language, not self-achievement.
Good works are repeatedly framed as beneficial, necessary, and fruitful.
